qq.doc: SMTP needs to be turned on in QQ mailbox settings and an authorization code (not a QQ password) must be used.

126.name: NetEase 126
126.doc: SMTP needs to be enabled and client authorization code used.

sina.name: Sina mailbox
sina.doc: SMTP needs to be turned on and an authorization code must be used.

exmail.name: Tencent corporate mail
exmail.doc: SMTP parameters can be viewed in the Tencent Business Mail/WeChat Business Mail management backend.

aliyun_enterprise.name: Alibaba corporate mail
aliyun_enterprise.doc: Alibaba Cloud Enterprise Mailbox (Wanwangmail) SMTP server.

feishu.name: Feishu business email
feishu.doc: It is necessary to enable the third-party client/SMTP in Feishu management background.

aliyun_dm.name: Alibaba Cloud Email Push
aliyun_dm.doc: Obtain the SMTP account and password through the Alibaba Cloud DirectMail console.

tencent_ses.name: Tencent cloud email push
tencent_ses.doc: Tencent Cloud SES console → Sending address → SMTP settings.

gmail.name: Gmail / Google Workspace
gmail.doc: Two-step verification needs to be turned on and an App Password must be used.

outlook365.name: Microsoft 365 / Exchange Online
outlook365.doc: The organization needs to allow SMTP AUTH; some tenants need to turn on Basic Authentication exceptions.

icloud.name: Apple iCloud
icloud.doc: An application-specific password needs to be generated.

proton.name: Proton Mail (Bridge)
proton.doc: Proton Mail Bridge needs to be running locally.

sendgrid.name: SendGrid
sendgrid.doc: The username is fixed to apikey and the password is SendGrid API Key.

ses_us_east_1.name: Amazon SES (us-east-1)
ses_us_east_1.doc: The AWS SES console creates SMTP credentials; the sender needs to be authenticated with SES.

mailjet.name: Mailjet
mailjet.doc: The password is Mailjet Secret Key.

brevo.name: Brevo (Sendinblue)
brevo.doc: SMTP keys are available at Brevo → SMTP & API.

mailchimp.name: Mailchimp Transactional (Mandrill)
mailchimp.doc: The password is Mandrill API Key.

custom.name: Custom / other
custom.doc: Manually fill in the SMTP host, port and encryption method.

copy.8a5a0d14: In the controller hosting mode, the platform delivers the business intent to the external controller via northbound RESTful, and the latter completes the underlying device orchestration.
